name: App Service FTP deployment not disabled
description: FTP or FTPS deployment is enabled on an App Service. FTP does not encrypt credentials or data (FTPS only encrypts the control channel). FTP access provides a deployment vector that can bypass application-level security controls.
remediation: Disable FTP deployment: App Service → Configuration → General settings → FTP state → Disabled. Use Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or VS Code for secure deployments. If FTPS is needed temporarily, restrict source IPs via App Service Access Restrictions.
